name: yt-instagram-to-mp4
author: KimboPulus
description: Local-first YouTube and Instagram video import and MP4 conversion tool.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @clipforge/shared && npm run build -w @clipforge/api && npm run build -w @clipforge/worker && npm run build -w @clipforge/web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build -w @clipforge/desktop
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,worker -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @clipforge/web" "npm run dev -w @clipforge/api" "npm run dev -w @clipforge/worker"
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build:desktop && node scripts/fetch-release-tools.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:desktop && node scripts/fetch-release-tools.mjs && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm
scripts.package:win: npm run build:desktop && node scripts/fetch-release-tools.mjs && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @clipforge/shared && npm run build -w @clipforge/api && npm run build -w @clipforge/worker && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present

linux.synopsis: Local permission-based video import and MP4 conversion tool
